description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a fixed synthetic stock and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The rifle is equipped with a detachable curved box magazine and a prominent handguard with integrated Picatinny rails for mounting accessories. The barrel is of standard length and is fitted with a muzzle brake at the tip, likely to reduce recoil and muzzle rise. The upper receiver has a rail-mounted iron sight, and there is a vertical foregrip attached to the lower rail for improved control during firing. The overall construction appears robust, with most components made from metal and polymer materials. This rifle is designed for urban tactical scenarios, offering modularity and adaptability for various attachments.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, curved magazine, rail system, and vertical foregrip, designed for urban use. Features include a muzzle brake, iron sights, and a robust polymer-metal build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle brake, barrel, and vertical foregrip aligned beneath the handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, curved magazine, handguard with rails, and mounted iron sight.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, pistol grip, and the back of the receiver, with the magazine and foregrip partially visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the rifle's profile, including the magazine, handguard, vertical foregrip, and muzzle brake.
